headline: ASML gains after UBS calls it Europe’s top semiconductor pick
summary: Investing.com -- UBS has reinstated ASML as its top pick in the European semiconductor sector, raising its price target to €1,900 from €1,600 and lifting its 2027 and 2028 earnings estimates well above consensus.

content.title: ASML gains after UBS calls it Europe’s top semiconductor pick
content.summary: Investing.com -- UBS has reinstated ASML as its top pick in the European semiconductor sector, raising its price target to €1,900 from €1,600 and lifting its 2027 and 2028 earnings estimates well above consensus.

headline: Lam Research opens Austria lab to advance chip packaging, cut costs
summary: Lam Research has opened a research lab in Salzburg, Austria, to advance a chip packaging technology ‌that promises to increase chip density and cut costs, ‌as the company looks to capitalize on surging AI demand for processors.  The U.S. ​chipmaking tools supplier said on Wednesday that the Salzburg facility will focus on panel-level packaging, which replaces the semiconductor industry's traditional circular silicon wafers with square panels.  Square panels can eliminate the dead space, allowing chipmakers to produce more chips ⁠per surface at a lower cost per unit — a crucial advantage as AI drives chip shortages.

Square panels can eliminate the dead space, allowing chipmakers to produce more chips ⁠per surface at a lower cost per unit — a crucial advantage as AI drives chip shortages.
